sentence_reviews.text: A scalar energy ranks compatible configurations lower than incompatible ones.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML, energy-based model discussion: probability models parameterized by an energy function, with lower energy corresponding to more probable/configuration-compatible states.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited source directly supports the low-energy/high-compatibility definition.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Energy-based objectives is to connect Generative modeling, Probability theory to downstream capabilities including Energy-based, Hopfield & Boltzmann models.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML, energy-based model and probabilistic generative model material, including Boltzmann-style energy formulations.
sentence_reviews.notes: The probability/generative connection and Boltzmann-style downstream family are supported, but the graph-role wording is atlas synthesis.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Energy-based, Hopfield & Boltzmann models
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML, sections discussing energy-based and Boltzmann models.
sentence_reviews.notes: Energy objectives directly underlie Boltzmann/energy-based models; Hopfield is plausible but not established as directly by the cited packet source.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML, probabilistic generative modeling and energy-based model material.
sentence_reviews.notes: Energy-based models are a probabilistic/generative modeling formulation, but the 'combined with' wording is an atlas relation.

sentence_reviews.text: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Generative modeling, Probability theory.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML, energy-based/probabilistic model training material; broader model-selection and objective-training context.
sentence_reviews.notes: The dependency clause is supported, but the objective-mismatch limitation is generic and not directly established by the cited energy-model source.

sentence_reviews.text: Energy-based objectives uses Generative modeling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML, energy-based probabilistic model material in generative-modeling context.
sentence_reviews.notes: The source supports energy-based generative/probabilistic modeling, though the exact dependency rationale is editorial.

sentence_reviews.text: Energy-based objectives uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML, energy functions used to define probability distributions.
sentence_reviews.notes: The evidence directly supports probability as core to normalized energy-based models.

sentence_reviews.text: Energy-based objectives uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML, energy-based model learning/training objective material.
sentence_reviews.notes: Energy-based model parameters are learned by optimizing training objectives, but the source does not state the atlas dependency wording verbatim.

edge_reviews.notes: Energy-based objectives are a generative/probabilistic modeling objective family; core strength is defensible.
Energy functions define probability distributions in the cited material.
Training energy objectives requires optimization; common strength is appropriate because probability/generative modeling are more central.
